title: Republicans cancel vote on ending Iran war before measure could pass
shortDescription: Republican leaders in the House of Representatives abruptly canceled a scheduled war powers vote, fearing it would pass amid defections and absences.

title: Capitol police officers call DOJ fund brazen act of corruption
shortDescription: Capitol police officers are suing over a $1.776B DOJ fund tied to a Trump lawsuit, arguing it could benefit Jan. 6 defendants.

title: Spencer Pratt, social media and voter ID? New trend, explained
shortDescription: As claims circulate on social media around the Los Angeles mayoral race, here's how California voting works.

title: Trump's blamed an audit for not releasing his tax returns. Now it's over
shortDescription: The president has said since 2016 he can't release his taxes because of ongoing IRS reviews. With those gone, watchdogs say he's run out of excuses.

title: President Trump abruptly scraps plan to sign executive order on AI
shortDescription: President Donald Trump abruptly halted plans to issue an executive order on AI hours before tech executives were set to watch him sign it.

title: DNC 2024 election autopsy finally released
shortDescription: The Democratic National Committee released an autopsy explaining the 2024 presidential election loss to President Trump that has vexed liberals.

title: Trump admin announces Minnesota fraud cases
shortDescription: Trump Administration officials announced charges for fraud schemes that allegedly targeted $90 million in taxpayer dollars.

title: Fuming at Trump over 'slush fund,' Senate GOP skips town without passing ICE bill
shortDescription: Senate Republicans emerged stone-faced from a tense meeting with Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche. Then they decided to leave town.

title: GOP lawmakers renew push to make daylight saving time permanent
shortDescription: GOP lawmakers are renewing their push to make daylight saving time permanent. Here's what to know.

title: Trump will 'try' to attend Don Jr.'s wedding
shortDescription: President Trump said he would try to attend his son Don Jr.'s wedding this weekend, but claimed that the date of ceremony wasn't "good timing."

title: DNC autopsy blames Biden and Harris campaign errors for 2024 loss
shortDescription: The disorganized report seeking to explain Democrat's collapse in 2024 was released after mounting pressure against the party and its leadership

title: Trump news, schedule and updates for Thursday, May 21
shortDescription: Vanessa Trump has cancer. U.S. Capitol police officers sued to stop the $1.776 'anti-weaponization fund.' This and more on the Trump news rundown.

title: 'Not good timing.' Trump says he'll 'try and make' son's wedding
shortDescription: The president seemed to confirm that his oldest son, Donald Trump Jr., is getting married over the weekend to socialite Bettina Anderson.

title: Trump reverses Biden EPA refrigerant rule
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says rolling back a Biden EPA refrigerant rule will cut grocery prices, shipping costs and air conditioning expenses.

title: 'Trump tower': US consulate in Greenland gets mega MAGA upgrade
shortDescription: The US inaugurated a new consulate in Greenland. It's bigger, more secure and deepens the U.S. diplomatic presence.

title: Arc de Trump: Trump's arch plan approved by Commission on Fine Arts
shortDescription: The president continues to remake the nation's capital through various construction projects including renovations at the Trump- Kennedy Center.

title: Despite low approval, Trump tightens grip on GOP | The Excerpt
shortDescription: A key Kentucky race underscores Trump’s sway over Republican voters, even as his national approval ratings remain low.

title: Trump’s core is loyal. Swing voters? Not so much.
shortDescription: Trump’s base stays loyal, but the voters who decide elections are moving away putting pressure on Republicans heading into November.

title: Trump invests millions in Kura Sushi chain
shortDescription: Among the long list of investments President Trump listed in a filing is Kura Sushi. The president invested $1 million-$5 million in the sushi chain.

title: Vanessa Trump's breast cancer diagnosis, explained
shortDescription: Vanessa Trump recently revealed she has been diagnosed with breast cancer. Here's what to know about the disease.
